title: Release
description: Data model for a release in a statistical production process.

statistics_name.description: Statistics shortname or statistics product name

git_commit_hash.description: Git commit hash for the release.

data_source.description: Reference or filepath to one or more datasets in the final data state (utdata or klargjorte-data) used as data source for the release.
data_source.$comment: Dataset filepath (eg. GCS-path to a parquet file).

daplalab_image.description: The tag of the Daplalab container image that produced the release.
